title: Sierra Blu Realty Platform Production Readiness
summary: Completed the build and production readiness for the Sierra Blu real estate platform. Key features integrated: AuthContext with inactivity timeout and guest mode, Firebase Auth and Firestore with real-time listeners for Leads/Listings/Sales, OpenClaw AI gateway (Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite), and Cinematic Luxury aesthetic guidelines. The full Next.js stack compiles without errors and lint rules pass.
